常見問題：

AC米蘭同國際米蘭又係有"米蘭"，應該點分？
ANS：AC米蘭簡稱米蘭，國際米蘭叫國米，避免稱呼做AC，因為AC係球會咁解，而milan先係名既簡稱。

AC米蘭仲係咪「老人院」？
ANS：現時全隊平均年齡為25歲。

今個轉會窗到目前為止簽咗咁多球員，遲啲仲會唔會有錢買人？
ANS：其實買球員好少會一炮過畀，多數都係分期，所以仲會有錢簽其他球員。

簽咗咁多球員會唔會過唔到FFP？
ANS：早前米蘭管理層有同UEFA探討經營計劃。
http://sempremilan.com/ts-fassone-meets-uefa-to-discuss-ac-milan-business-plan（By 二石四鳥）

加度素賽後採訪
加度素：足球沒有不可能 次回合去倫敦不會打醬油
新浪網 2018-03-09 06:02:55
　　歐霸盃1/8淘汰賽首回合，AC米蘭主場0-2不敵阿仙奴後加度素表示米蘭犯了太多錯誤，表現得不像一支球隊，阿仙奴配得上勝利。

　　加度素：「我們知道這將是一場非常艱難的比賽，阿仙奴正在經歷一段艱難的時刻，但他們擁有優秀的實力，而我們犯了太多的錯誤。我們沒有像一個整體在運轉，阿仙奴理應獲得勝利。」

　　加度素：「我嗎本可以做更多的事情，但是我們表現得像一個整體，所以每次進攻都是一次危險。在這個水平上踢球（面對阿仙奴）對於這些小夥子們來說是新鮮的，所以我們會繼續努力並且沒有失去信心。在我們的比賽當中有一些我們能夠學習的。」

　　「我們現在的注意力將轉移到熱那亞，之後我們將開始備戰倫敦的次回合比賽。你永遠不能對足球說不，所以我們會去哪裡，然後盡力而為。我們當然不會把比賽變成酋長球場一日遊。」

　　「我們是AC米蘭，身上這件波衫需要得到尊重。今晚本來可以入球，但一切都還沒有結束，不過已經很難了，我們會全力而為。我接受雲格比賽的方式，而我們也給了阿仙奴太多的空間，並且總是漏人。這個結果對於阿仙奴來說很重要，對於我們自己的錯誤也很重要。」

Bonucci: 'Milan were too anxious'

Leonardo Bonucci felt Milan were “too anxious and made too many simple errors” against Arsenal, then paid an emotional tribute to Davide Astori.

The Rossoneri lost the first leg of their Europa League Round of 16 tie 2-0 at home to Arsenal, with a deflected Henrikh Mkhitaryan strike and Aaron Ramsey springing the offside trap.

“A little fear and anxiety set in during the first half. It’ll all help players to gain experience,” the captain told Sky Sport Italia.

“The second leg will be difficult to turn this around, but anything can happen in football. We can’t get away with failing to defend and attack as a team. We couldn’t get the shape right and Arsenal moved the ball quickly to stretch us too.

“If we go to London with the spirit we showed in the second half, then we can get a result. I think today we lacked the courage to take on responsibility, both in possession and closing down their passing channels. We did better after the break, but allowed Danny Welbeck that one chance on our error. We could’ve done a lot better with our passing and control.

“I too made too many simple errors, as we were just too anxious. We were more daring in the second half and games like this require courage. We conceded two entirely avoidable goals.”

Milan players had to take the field today, so could not attend Fiorentina captain Astori’s funeral in Florence, but Bonucci fought back tears as he paid tribute.

“Ciao Davide, I didn’t have a chance to go and salute you. He was the number one in so many ways, his death really hit me hard. He’s a great teammate, a great man and I’ll always carry him with me.”

Gattuso: 'Milan weren't a team'

Gennaro Gattuso concedes Milan “made too many mistakes, never played like a team and Arsenal deserved the victory.”

The Gunners earned a 2-0 first leg win at San Siro in the Europa League Round of 16 thanks to Henrikh Mkhitaryan’s deflected effort and Aaron Ramsey springing the offside trap.

“We knew this was going to be a very difficult match,” said the Coach in his Press conference.

“Arsenal were coming off a tough moment, but have enormous quality at their disposal, while we made too many mistakes. We never played like a united team and Arsenal deserved the victory.

“We could’ve done more, but we didn’t play as a team, so every time they attacked, it was a danger. Playing at this level is new to many of these lads, so we look forward without losing confidence. It was an off day and Arsenal deserved it. We’ll learn from this.

“Our minds now go to Genoa, then after that we’ll start to prepare for the second leg in London. You can never say never in football, so we’ll go there and give it our best. We are certainly not going to the Emirates on a day trip.

“We are Milan and have a jersey to respect. We could’ve scored tonight, it’s not over yet, but it’s difficult. We’ll give it our best shot.

“I expected Wenger to approach the game this way and it was our mistake giving Arsenal too much space. We allowed them to burst through our lines too easily and were always a man short.

“This result owes a lot to Arsenal and a lot to our own errors.”

日前，前AC米蘭球員法明尼在接受《米蘭體育報》採訪時對加度素擔任米蘭教練這一工作表示認可，並直言加度素能執教米蘭很長一段時間。

　　「加度素成為米蘭的雲格？為什麼不可以？他在米蘭待了好多年，對球隊非常瞭解，他能在短時間內就改變了球隊的精神面貌。」

　　「加度素還是一名球員的時候，他就已經喜歡各種研究對手戰術及球員特性，現在的他能成為一名出色的教練，我表示並不意外。」

　　「如果加度素能在米蘭執教很長時間，我會非常為他高興，因為他與米蘭的關係密不可分。我希望米蘭未來能夠殺回歐冠盃，也盼望加度素能在長久地執教米蘭。」

　　「我們在當隊友的時候，他就有未來要成為教練的想法，在場上他也一直是一個中場指揮官。」

　　「我和加度素有太多美妙的回憶了。我倆性格特像，尤其我特別喜歡和他在訓練場上‘打架’，當然，我也很喜歡和他在一塊兒聊天。」

起曬雞皮

Milan to make Wilshere swoop?

Milan are interested in signing Arsenal midfielder Jack Wilshere at the end of the season, according to reports.

The 26-year-old starred as the Gunners beat the Rossoneri 2-0 in Thursday night’s Europa League Round of 16 meeting between the sides.

However, he is out of contract at the end of the campaign and has reportedly been told he must take a pay cut in order to agree a new deal in North London.

With less than six months now remaining of Wilshere’s current £120,000 contract, he is free to enter into negotiations over his future with foreign clubs.

And according to the Daily Express, Milan are one of the sides most keen on securing the England international’s signature.

The English daily also claims that Juventus and Sampdoria are looking into the possibility of signing Wilshere.

Gattuso: 'Curious to see Milan reaction'

Gennaro Gattuso was “curious to see how Milan would react” after defeat to Arsenal and relished their last-gasp win away to Genoa.

Andre Silva came off the bench and nodded in a Suso cross with the last kick of the game, his first Serie A goal.

“We were worried and I was curious frankly to see how we’d react to our first defeat in two and a half months. I got a good response,” confessed the Coach to Mediaset Premium.

“My compliments to Genoa, as they caused us huge problems, but we played with character, moved the ball around without fear and I really appreciated that aspect.

“If you look at the table, we have closed the gap a great deal. There are still 11 games to go, seven of them at home. We’ll see. It’s important to get a few players back in shape.

“I’m happy that Andre Silva scored his first Serie A goal. It’s already hard to carry this prestigious jersey, even more so when you are young, but we must continue our work and grow over time, believing in ourselves.”

The Rossoneri have won four Serie A games in a row without conceding a goal, but the only defeat in their last 14 competitive matches was 2-0 to Arsenal in the Europa League on Thursday.

“I heard a lot of bar talk about our physical shape against Arsenal, but we simply got the wrong attitude. We had prepared a different approach, but got the first half completely wrong and left them far too many spaces. Arsenal have the quality to put the ball where they want if you give them time and space.

“We cannot give gifts to anyone, the team has understood that and we go forward with those lessons. Don’t forget we played well, but could easily have lost this game.

“We are not going to London for a walk in the park, we are representing a glorious jersey and want to see what happens next.”

Andre Silva found the back of the net at last, but Nikola Kalinic continues to disappoint.

“Kalinic is missing a goal, but he is a strong player with good technique. I want to see him more determined when the ball comes or he has to bully defenders to find space. He lets himself be pushed around too easily.

“Obviously, strikers live to score goals and don’t care too much whether they play well or not, but we appreciate his hard work for the team.”

Milan are challenging Inter for a place in the top four, so does that mean he is cheering on Napoli tonight?

Gattuso’s response was to waggle his eyebrows and smile. Enough said.

Gattuso: 'Curious to see Milan reaction'

Gennaro Gattuso was “curious to see how Milan would react” after defeat to Arsenal and relished their last-gasp win away to Genoa.

Andre Silva came off the bench and nodded in a Suso cross with the last kick of the game, his first Serie A goal.

“We were worried and I was curious frankly to see how we’d react to our first defeat in two and a half months. I got a good response,” confessed the Coach to Mediaset Premium.

“My compliments to Genoa, as they caused us huge problems, but we played with character, moved the ball around without fear and I really appreciated that aspect.

“If you look at the table, we have closed the gap a great deal. There are still 11 games to go, seven of them at home. We’ll see. It’s important to get a few players back in shape.

“I’m happy that Andre Silva scored his first Serie A goal. It’s already hard to carry this prestigious jersey, even more so when you are young, but we must continue our work and grow over time, believing in ourselves.”

The Rossoneri have won four Serie A games in a row without conceding a goal, but the only defeat in their last 14 competitive matches was 2-0 to Arsenal in the Europa League on Thursday.

“I heard a lot of bar talk about our physical shape against Arsenal, but we simply got the wrong attitude. We had prepared a different approach, but got the first half completely wrong and left them far too many spaces. Arsenal have the quality to put the ball where they want if you give them time and space.

“We cannot give gifts to anyone, the team has understood that and we go forward with those lessons. Don’t forget we played well, but could easily have lost this game.

“We are not going to London for a walk in the park, we are representing a glorious jersey and want to see what happens next.”

Andre Silva found the back of the net at last, but Nikola Kalinic continues to disappoint.

“Kalinic is missing a goal, but he is a strong player with good technique. I want to see him more determined when the ball comes or he has to bully defenders to find space. He lets himself be pushed around too easily.

“Obviously, strikers live to score goals and don’t care too much whether they play well or not, but we appreciate his hard work for the team.”

Milan are challenging Inter for a place in the top four, so does that mean he is cheering on Napoli tonight?

Gattuso’s response was to waggle his eyebrows and smile. Enough said.
